g.text: Each service (Upload, Job Dispatcher, Transcoder Workers, DB Writer) is an independent K8s Deployment with HPA. Workers auto-scale on Redis queue depth via KEDA.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Job Dispatcher: BLPOP (blocking dequeue, one job per worker) | ACK Queue: Redis Streams XADD/XREAD with consumer groups for exactly-once, durable delivery.

text.font-family: Excalifont, Xiaolai, sans-serif, Segoe UI Emoji

g.text: Transcoder flow: BLPOP job -> GET raw from S3 -> ffmpeg transcode to HLS chunks -> PUT all resolutions to S3 -> XADD ACK -> DB Writer updates PostgreSQL.
